oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Remembering Georgia Fletcher
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Lang, Janice
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 47 Number 1 (December 2020).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Remembering Georgia Fletcher,PHW*HRUJLDLQZKHQZHZHUHERWKZRUNLQJDVSUDFWLFHPDQDJHUVIRU GLIIHUHQWYHWHULQDU\KRVSLWDOVLQ+RXVWRQ7H[DV6KHZDVZRUNLQJDWDQDYLDQ DQGH[RWLFSUDFWLFHDQG,ZDVZRUNLQJIRUDVPDOODQLPDOSUDFWLFH,KDGMXVW JRWWHQ P\ ILUVW ELUG D FRFNDWLHO VR ZH KLW LW RII LPPHGLDWHO\ 6KH KDG QRW RZQHGDSDUURWEHIRUHVKHJRWWKDWSRVLWLRQEXWVKHTXLFNO\DFTXLUHGD*RIILQV FRFNDWRRD0ROXFFDQFRFNDWRRDQGDQ$IULFDQ*UH\WKDWQHHGHGUHKRPLQJDQG IRXQG D KRPH ZLWK KHU , ZDV YHU\ LPSUHVVHG ZLWK KHU FROOHFWLRQ $V \RX PLJKWLPDJLQHZHGLGQ¶WWDONDERXWSUDFWLFHPDQDJHPHQWYHU\PXFK:LWKRXU ILUVWPHHWLQJVKHLQWURGXFHGPHWRWKHZRUOGRISDUURWVDQGIRUWKDW,DPWKDQN IXO6KHPRYHGEDFNWR6W/RXLVIURP+RXVWRQLQ$IWHUPRYLQJEDFNVKH EHFDPHDFWLYHLQWKH*DWHZD\3DUURW&OXEDQGHYHQWXDOO\VHUYHGDV3UHVLGHQW RIWKHFOXEDQGDOVRVHUYHGRQWKHLU%RDUGRI'LUHFWRUVIRUPDQ\\HDUV 6KHDQGVHYHUDOIULHQGVIRUPHGDJURXSFDOOHGWKH3DUURW3RVVHDQG *HRUJLD ZDV WKH 6KHULII (DFK RQH KDG D GLIIHUHQW H[SHUWLVH LQ ZRUNLQJZLWKELUGV)URPEUHHGLQJKDQGUDLVLQJDQGVRFLDOL]LQJ WUDLQLQJ DQG PDNLQJ WR\V DQG SURGXFWV IRUELUGVWKH\ FRYHUHG DOO EDVHV)RU\HDUVVKHDQGWKH3RVVHZRXOGDWWHQGELUGIDLUVIURP,OOL QRLV WR 7H[DV 0LVVLVVLSSL DQG 7HQQHVVHH DQGPDGHPDQ\IULHQGV DORQJWKHZD\6KHVSHQWPDQ\KRXUVWDONLQJWRSHRSOHDERXWSDU URWVVRPHWLPHVWDONLQJWKHPRXWRIJHWWLQJRQHLILWZDVQ¶WWKHULJKW WLPHRUWKHULJKWELUGIRUWKHP6KHHQFRXUDJHGWKHPWRVSHQGPRUH WLPHUHVHDUFKLQJELUGVEHIRUHGHFLGLQJWRJHWRQH:KHQ$)$KDGWKHLUFRQIHUHQFHLQ6W/RXLVLQVKHLQYLWHG PHWRFRPHIRUDYLVLW6KHVDLGVKHKHDUGWKHUHZDVD³SDUURW´FRQ IHUHQFHWKDWZHHNHQGDQGZHVKRXOGJRDQGWKDWZDVRXULQWURGXF WLRQWR$)$:HERWKMRLQHG$)$WKHQDQGZHQHYHUPLVVHGDFRQ IHUHQFHDIWHUWKDWRQH:HVWDUWHGDWWHQGLQJWKH6XQGD\$)$ERDUG PHHWLQJVDVLQWHUHVWHGPHPEHUVIDLUO\HDUO\DIWHUMRLQLQJ7DNLQJLQWKHVLJKWVDWWKH $)$&RQIHUHQFHLQ7XFVRQClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
